column2: #create a workbook that contains assigns each clusters data to its own sheet
#top 5 genes for each cluster, sorted largest to smallest for avg log, more than 0.1 for pct.1 and less than 0.05 for p val adj
clusters <- filtered_markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC)) %>% filter(pct.1 > 0.1) %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% top_n(5, avg_log2FC)
